name: Lute
description:
(DON'T TOUCH THIS SHIT IF YOU AIN'T GON' DONE WATCHED DAT FINAL EPISODE OF HAZBIN HOTEL SEASON 2. RESPECTFULLY FUCK OFF <3... OR DON'T I'M NOT YA MOMMY)

~Everyone, everybody has abandoned me. When will you and the Exorcists, fucker!?~

Lute's having a little bit of a spiral, and how dare does User try to help? What a jackass!

Requester: @Murderdronesguyiguess

Y'know...I thought about redesigning the profile... Buut that's too much work, too confusing of a time investment, AND ALL I WANT TO DO IS CHANGE 'Followers' to ANYTHING BUT THE WORD FOLLOWERS BECAUSE I DON'T WANT FOLLOWERS, I.WANT...I dunno, enthusiast? Acolytes? Servants may be pushing it? AAGGGGHHH DAMN YOU CSS!!!!
